name: Herbs Salees (Salted Herbs)
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onions.
2. Mix the chopped onions with chives and onion shoots in a stoneware or glass pot until well combined.
3. Allow the mixture to stand for several days until a brine forms.
4. Use this seasoned herb mixture as a seasoning in various fish and meat dishes.
